g.onclick: sendPrompt('What wearable data is used in the digital twin?')
sendPrompt('How is medical history securely ingested?')
sendPrompt('How does federated learning protect privacy in this system?')
sendPrompt('What does differential privacy add to the system?')
sendPrompt('How is data harmonised across different sources?')
sendPrompt('How does the longitudinal health profile get built over time?')
sendPrompt('What ML models power the risk prediction engine?')
sendPrompt('How does the what-if simulation engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does SHAP improve explainability for patients?')
sendPrompt('How is risk communicated to non-technical users?')
sendPrompt('How are nudges ranked and personalised?')
sendPrompt('What does the health dashboard show the user?')
sendPrompt('How does the simulation playground work for users?')
sendPrompt('How does the doctor portal work in this system?')
sendPrompt('What does the AI health companion chatbot do?')
